features.name: unique case on enum with incomplete coverage
features.description: Code should include a unique case statement operating on an enum variable where not all enum values are listed as case items

features.name: priority case on enum with incomplete coverage
features.description: Code should include a priority case statement operating on an enum variable where not all enum values are listed as case items

features.name: enum type FSM with missing case item
features.description: Code should include an enum-based FSM where the state variable transitions to an enum value that is not covered in a unique case statement
